Empty text: link:https://example.com[]

Attribute-only role: link:https://example.com[role=include]

Attribute-only URL role: https://example.com[role=include]

Text with role: link:https://example.com[Example,role=external]

Text with role and window: link:https://example.com[Example,role=external,window=_blank]

Attribute-like mailto text: mailto:joe@example.com[role=include]

Mailto text with role: mailto:joe@example.com[Joe,role=include]
